query:
INSERT INTO cf_funnels (cf_id, cf_public_id, workspace_id, name, current_path, archived, live_mode, tags, opt_in_count, order_count, last_synced_at, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
  (873356, 'jypovM', 421845, 'AH – $25 Trial Session', '/trial', 0, 0, '[{"id":121271,"name":"Imported"},{"id":121914,"name":"AH Trial"}]', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (876010, 'YxbZOk', 421845, 'Golf VX AH – Membership Giveaway', '/membershipgiveaway', 0, 0, '[]', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (876385, 'JOMGEy', 421845, 'Golf VX AH – 1-Month Membership Giveaway', '/membership-giveaway', 0, 0, '[]', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (877415, 'jnzQVQ', 421845, 'Chicago Bears Game Day – Watch Party', '/bears', 0, 0, '[]', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (883349, 'NnzaXd', 421845, 'Golf VX AH — Drive Day (Public)', '/drive-day', 0, 0, '[{"id":123589,"name":"PBGA"},{"id":123590,"name":"Drive Day"}]', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (885917, 'JOMBpd', 421845, 'PBGA Junior Summer Camp', '/summer-camp', 0, 0, '[{"id":123589,"name":"PBGA"},{"id":123889,"name":"Summer Camp"}]', 1241, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (888788, 'YVBabb', 421845, 'Golf VX AH - Annual Membership Giveaway | Q1 2026', '/anniversary', 0, 0, '[{"id":124327,"name":"Giveaway"},{"id":124328,"name":"Annual Giveaway"},{"id":124329,"name":"Q1"}]', 70, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (899483, 'jnzPWZ', 421845, 'PBGA Winter Clinic', '/pbga-winter-clinic', 0, 0, '[{"id":123589,"name":"PBGA"},{"id":126126,"name":"Winter Clinic"}]', 11, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = VALUES(name),
  opt_in_count = VALUES(opt_in_count),
  tags = VALUES(tags),
  last_synced_at = NOW();
